---
title: "negative_axis_number_strict"
generated: true
description: "Convert a standard axis number to a negative axis number."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:negative_axis_number_strict -->
```python
negative_axis_number_strict(axis: int, ndim: int) -> int
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:negative_axis_number_strict -->
Convert a standard axis number to a negative axis number.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:negative_axis_number_strict -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `axis` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `ndim` | `int` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `int`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
